newsArray.title: Pat Cummins back at the helm as Hyderabad opt to field first after toss win vs Rajasthan
newsArray.description: Pat Cummins is back. The SRH captain who missed the start of IPL 2026 with a lumbar stress injury won the toss at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur on April 25 and chose to field first for Match 36 against Rajasthan Royals. RR vs SRH: Return of Pat Cummins for Hyderabad Cummins has not played a competitive game for some time and was candid about the anticipation at the toss. "Still really fresh. It's been a little while but I've had really good preparation, a couple of bowls over here. I have...
creator: amar bhalla

newsArray.title: Delhi LG Shows Support for Capitals in IPL 2026 Match
newsArray.description: In an exciting IPL 2026 match, Delhi's Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu showed his support for the Delhi Capitals as they faced the Punjab Kings. KL Rahul made history with an unbeaten 152 runs, setting a new record for the highest individual score by an Indian in IPL. Despite a strong performance, Punjab's bowlers struggled against Delhi's batting prowess. This match highlights the competitive spirit of the IPL and the significance of sportsmanship.
creator: narendra chaudhary

newsArray.title: RR vs SRH LIVE cricket score: Rajasthan Royals set to bat first, Sunrisers Hyderabad elect to field
newsArray.description: Game 36 of the ongoing IPL (Indian Premier League) 2026 sees Rajasthan Royals and Sunrisers Hyderabad. The two sides lock horns at the Sawai Mansingh Stadium in Jaipur. The clash begins with Rajasthan coming in to bat first after losing the toss. It is worth noting that Sunrisers Hyderabad handed Rajasthan Royals their first loss of the IPL 2026. The inaugural champions were unbeaten before they took on Hyderabad, and looking to register their fifth straight win of the season, Royals were handed a hefty loss, and they will seek redemption.

newsArray.title: RR vs SRH, IPL 2026 36th Match Live Toss And Scorecard: सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद के कप्तान ईशान किशन ने जीता टॉस, पहले गेंदबाजी करने का किया फैसला. यहां देखें दोनों टीमों की प्लेइंग इलेवन और लाइव स्कोरकार्ड
newsArray.description: सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद की टीम इस सीजन में संतुलित नजर आ रही है. टीम के पास ट्रेविस हेड और अभिषेक शर्मा जैसे आक्रामक बल्लेबाज हैं. मिडिल ऑर्डर में हेनरिक क्लासेन और ईशान किशन टीम को मजबूती देते हैं. वहीं, गेंदबाजी में जयदेव उनादकट अहम भूमिका निभा सकते हैं. दूसरी तरफ, लखनऊ सुपर जायंट्स की टीम में निकोलस पूरन, मिचेल मार्श और एडेन मार्करम जैसे खिलाड़ी मौजूद हैं.
keywords: rr vs srh head to head
rr vs srh हेड टू हेड
creator: siddharth raghuvanshi
